texto: Here lies the challenge in finding good salespeople. You need excellent empathizers who aren't so empathetic they can't close a sale. And you need people with strong ego needs who can still take a moment to figure out what another person wants. They must be aggressive enough to close, but not so aggressive they put people off. Too much empathy and you'll be a nice guy finishing last. Too much ego drive and you'll be scorching earth everywhere you go. Not enough of either and you shouldn't be in sales at all. It's a miracle anyone can do this job.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Philip Delves Broughton sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Here lies the challenge in finding good salespeople. You need excellent empathizers who aren't so…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, fact, close, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: It felt like one of those movies where a bunch of misfits, each gifted in his own way - one in explosives, another in disguise, another in forgery or karate- are thrown together to achieve a dangerous mission.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Philip Delves Broughton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sucesso. O trecho “It felt like one of those movies where a bunch of misfits, each gifted in his own way - one in ex…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, goal, groups pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de groups e harvard.
